name: Harvest Apple Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Coat a large skillet with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Add juice, carrots, celery, and onion; cook until tender. Stir in nutmeg.
4. Lightly coat a three- to four-quart casserole dish with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Place cornbread cubes, apple mixture, walnuts, and wheat germ in the casserole dish; toss lightly.
6. Add onion mixture; drizzle with enough broth to moisten.
7. Bake for 30-40 minutes.
